| Property    | Attribute    | Description | Type                            | Default                                  |
| ----------- | ------------ | ----------- | ------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------- |

| `barRadius` | `bar-radius` |             | `number`                        | `6`                                      |
| `color`     | `color`      |             | `string`                        | `'var(--color-extended-green, #05b96c)'` |
| `data`      | `data`       |             | `ChartDatum[] \| string`        | `[]`                                     |
| `vertical`  | `vertical`   |             | `boolean`                       | `false`                                  |
